raw_transcript: Meika Jordan was a six-year-old girl from Calgary, Alberta, Canada. Emergency services were called after a report that she had fallen down the stairs. Investigators later questioned whether the injuries matched that explanation. The case involved her father Spencer Jordan and stepmother Marie-Eve Magoon. The case later went through the courts and reached the Supreme Court of Canada. The story is sensitive because it involves a child victim, so the final episode must be respectful, factual, and not graphic.
